title: At the Post Office
opening: Hello! How can I help you today?

t1.prompt: Hello! How can I help you today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! (Heh-LOH!) How can I help you today?

t2.prompt: Okay, you want to send a parcel. Where are you sending it?
t2.promptTranslation: Okay, you want to send a parcel. Where are you sending it? (Wair arr yoo SEND-ing it?)

t3.prompt: Stamps, no problem. What kind of stamps do you need? First class or second class?
t3.promptTranslation: Stamps, no problem. What kind of stamps do you need? First class or second class?

t4.prompt: For within the UK, do you want standard or special delivery? Special delivery includes tracking.
t4.promptTranslation: For within the UK, do you want standard or special delivery? Special delivery includes tracking.

t5.prompt: For international, do you want airmail or economy? Airmail is faster. Do you need tracking?
t5.promptTranslation: For international, do you want airmail or economy? Airmail is faster. Do you need tracking?

t6.prompt: Okay, how many stamps do you need?
t6.promptTranslation: Okay, how many stamps do you need?

t7.prompt: Okay, your parcel for the UK is ready. Is there anything else for today?
t7.promptTranslation: Okay, your parcel for the UK is ready. Is there anything else for today?

t8.prompt: Okay, for an international parcel, you will need a customs form. Do you have one, or do you need one?
t8.promptTranslation: Okay, for an international parcel, you will need a customs form. Do you have one, or do you need one?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't understand. Could you please say that again?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't understand. Could you please say that again? (Kood yoo pleez SAY that uh-GEN?)

t-end.prompt: Thank you! Have a good day.
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you! Have a good day.
